zh:
Previous attempt failed. Retry and output exactly one valid final_summary tool call.

Required fields:
1. success (boolean)
2. summary (string, non-empty)
3. failedSteps (array)
4. toolEvidence (array)
5. feedbackEvidence (array)

Strongly preferred fields:
6. eventTimeline (array)
7. issues (array)
8. completion (object)
9. unresolvedItems (array)
10. nextActions (array)
11. highlights (array)

Summary must explicitly describe: outcome, event timeline, problems/root causes, remaining gaps, next actions.

Tool call MUST use Sentra XML typed parameters only (<string>, <number>, <array>, <object>, etc.). Do not put raw JSON text directly inside <parameter>.

Current attempt: {{attempt}}/{{max_retries}}

Both toolEvidence and feedbackEvidence must cite concrete evidence from RUNTIME_EVIDENCE_XML.
